project.name: EarthOnline 玻璃质感产品介绍页
project.styleDefinitionBrief: Dark glassmorphism landing page — animated aurora orbs (sage/coral/gold/blue) behind frosted glass cards, restrained glass on navbar + hero CTA + feature cards, premium depth through layered transparency
project.designRead: AI experience product landing / everyday users seeking meaning / warm-cool glassmorphism on dark / medium-low density / avoid neon sci-fi gradients

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: warm-cool aurora gradient (gold-coral-sage-blue orbs on dark #0B0D17)
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: four brand hues from existing identity used as gradient orb colors, not as separate UI colors

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: radius-lg (16px) for cards/CTAs, radius-full for pills/badges, large radius for organic glass feel
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter + PingFang SC, tight tracking on display, normal on body
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 8px base unit, generous vertical spacing for showcase feel
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: glassmorphism cards with backdrop-blur, gradient border pseudo-elements, floating shadow depth
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: glass-bg rgba(255,255,255,0.06) + backdrop-blur(40px) saturate(180%), multi-layer box-shadow, inset highlight for glass edge
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: lucide-style inline SVG icons, one hero product mockup image, CSS-only aurora orbs for ambient color
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: subtle hover lift (translateY -1px) + shadow growth, smooth 0.2s transitions

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: glassmorphism sticky navbar with backdrop-blur, semi-transparent bg, brand mark + nav links + CTA
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: four brand aurora hues (sage/coral/gold/blue) as ambient gradient, not as clickable color
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Inter + PingFang SC, 8px base unit, tight tracking on display headings
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: glass button with backdrop-blur, bright border, hover lift effect
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: centered hero, grid feature cards, max-w-6xl container

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Dark glassmorphism with animated aurora orbs using existing brand colors (sage/coral/gold/blue). Glass effects applied selectively to navbar, hero CTA, and feature cards. Restraint over maximalism.

pages.title: 产品介绍页
pages.businessScenario: Product landing page introducing EarthOnline experience-to-medal concept
pages.visualNorthStar: A dark immersive canvas with slowly drifting aurora orbs behind frosted glass panels — warm brand colors bleeding through translucent surfaces create a sense of precious memories being revealed
pages.compositionPattern: Full-viewport hero with centered headline + product mockup, flowing into staggered feature grid, ending with glass CTA band

assets.semanticDescription: Product UI mockup showing the conversation-to-medal flow on dark glassmorphism interface
